name: Poblano-Pine Nut Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 large poblano peppers, roasted and peeled, left whole
1 red bell pepper, roasted and peeled, left whole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the roasted and peeled poblano peppers (whole), red bell pepper (whole), garlic, lime juice, marjoram, and olive oil.
2. Mix well and season with salt and pepper.
3. Just before serving, add the toasted pine nuts to the salsa and stir until well combined.
4. Serve atop grilled chicken breast or with chips.
Yield: 2 cups of salsa.
